data.title: Justin Sun: The consequences of FDT founder’s fraud will be determined by the judicial system and regulators
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Sun Yuchen posted on the X platform that First Digital Trust (FDT) is insolvent and is a statement of fact without any emotional color. If you have any relationship with them, please cut off the relationship as soon as possible to protect your assets. As for what consequences its founder Vincent Chok will face for his fraudulent behavior-this will be determined by the judicial system and regulators. Sun Yuchen added: "It is not recommended that anyone over-interpret my words, especially for my closest partners. I believe in them-our trust has been built over the past decade through long-term cooperation worth tens of billions of dollars. I firmly believe that this trust remains unwavering."

data.title: Jupiter acquires Solana ecosystem creator platform DRiP
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Jupiter has acquired Solana Ecosystem Creator Platform DRiP. The specific acquisition amount has not been disclosed. DRiP completed an $8 million seed round of financing in September last year, led by NFX, Coinbase Ventures and Progression (a fund founded by former TikTok executives). (SolanaFloor)

data.title: Bitcoin Investment Timing: Insights from Bitwise's Matt Hougan
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Matt Hougan, the chief investment officer at Bitwise, has provided a detailed analysis on the current investment landscape for Bitcoin (BTC). Hougan argues that, from a risk-adjusted perspective, there has never been a more favorable time to invest in Bitcoin. He highlights the transformation of Bitcoin from its early days, which were fraught with technology risks, regulatory threats, trading inefficiencies, and reputational concerns. Today, these risks have significantly diminished, paving the way for Bitcoin's integration into the global financial ecosystem.

Hougan points to several key developments that have contributed to Bitcoin's growing stability and acceptance. The introduction of Bitcoin ETFs, the adoption by major institutional investors, and even the strategic reserve of Bitcoin by the U.S. government have all played a role in solidifying its position. He notes that Bitcoin currently represents only 10% of gold's market value, suggesting that it has substantial room for growth. Hougan believes that matching gold's market value is merely a milestone in Bitcoin's long-term journey, implying a potential tenfold increase from its current valuation.

Furthermore, Hougan discusses Bitcoin's long-term price potential and the anticipated acceleration of institutional adoption. He emphasizes the structural long-term demand that is poised to enter the market, which is set against a backdrop of severely limited new supply. This dynamic, according to Hougan, could drive Bitcoin to unprecedented heights. His insights offer a compelling case for investors considering Bitcoin as a strategic asset in their portfolios.

data.title: CoinList returns to the US — and is hosting a token sale for DoubleZero
data.description:
After a five-year absence, CoinList is making a U. S. comeback and hosting its first token sale for DoubleZero Foundation.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/349308/coinlist-returns-the-u-s-token-sale-doublezero?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Tariff fears spark $161M sell-off in spot BTC & ETH ETFs – What’s next for crypto?
data.description:
Tariff fears triggered a potential sell-off of $161 million in spot BTC and ETH ETFs.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/tariff-fears-spark-161m-sell-off-in-spot-btc-eth-etfs-whats-next-for-crypto/

data.title: Celestia Gets a Major Boost with VanEck’s Newly Launched ETN
data.description:
TL;DR VanEck launched an ETN linked to Celestia, allowing investment in the TIA token without directly managing digital assets. TIA uses a modular model that separates consensus and data, making it easier to create customized blockchains. The product, domiciled in Liechtenstein, has a NAV of $8. 28 and manages $27. 75 million in assets with a 1. 50%. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/celestia-gets-a-major-boost-with-vanecks-newly-launched-etn/

data.title: He Yi: Binance doesn’t know the details of Justin Sun’s legal dispute
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News He Yi posted on the X platform: "We are contacting FDUSD and looking for someone in the middle of the night. The announcement should also be issued by FDUSD. We will audit FDUSD based on our judgment, but we don't know the inside story of their legal dispute."

data.title: First Digital's February Reserve Account Report Shows Total Reserve Assets Exceed $2.05 Billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: First Digital's February reserve account report shows that First Digital's total reserve assets are US$2,051,348,188.70, and the FDUSD issuance (circulation) is 2,041,924,819.94 pieces. The reserve assets cover more than 100% of the issued FDUSD, meeting the 1:1 reserve requirements.

data.title: He Yi: Binance has its own risk control, and my personal judgment does not represent FDUSD’s
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Binance co-founder He Yi wrote: "No one knew that Justin Sun would tweet in the middle of the night, but Binance launched Launchpool's stablecoin and will regularly check the funds. Binance has its own risk control. Binance postlisting is also looking for fdusd to try to understand the situation. We are just making logical judgments. There is no large investor group or insider group. Many people are asking if Binance launchpool's FDUSD will have any problems. Sisi (Binance customer service) casually replied to my judgment in a group. My judgment does not represent FDUSD company."

data.title: X Corp. Wants Supreme Court to Stop 'Suspicionless' Crypto Transaction Data Requests
data.description:
The amicus curiae brief aims to prevent law enforcement from using subpoenas to get user data from third parties without warrants.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/x-corp-wants-supreme-court-to-stop-suspicionless-crypto-transaction-data-requests
